# Annecy

> Geotechnical engineering company in France, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amelioration](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/amelioration/)
- [Analyse Granulometrique](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-granulometrique/)
- [Analyse Liquefaction Sols](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-liquefaction-sols/)
- [Analyse Pieux Frottement Lateral](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-pieux-frottement-lateral/)
- [Analyse Reponse Site](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-reponse-site/)
- [Analyse Stabilite Pentes](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-stabilite-pentes/)
- [Analyse Tassement Differentiel](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-tassement-differentiel/)
- [Calcul Coefficient Securite](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/calcul-coefficient-securite/)
- [Caracterisation Sols Residuels](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/caracterisation-sols-residuels/)
- [Cbr Laboratoire](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/cbr-laboratoire/)
- [Cisaillement Direct](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/cisaillement-direct/)
- [Classification Sols](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/classification-sols/)
- [Compression Simple](https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/compression-simple/)

## Contact
- Website: https://annecy.geotechnique.sbs/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in France.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
